title: LEGO Creator 3in1 Medieval Horse Knight Castle Toy - Transforms into a Jousting Tournament Scene or a Town - incl. 6 Minifigures - Creative Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys & Girls - 31168
features: 3 building options in 1 box – The LEGO Creator 3in1 Medieval Horse Knight Castle set is a fun building toy for 9+ year old boys and girls to build and rebuild 3 different models with the same bricks
Endless play options – Kids can role-play action-packed stories with 3 different medieval building toys (models cannot be built simultaneously): a toy castle, a jousting set or a town playset
Creative toys – The Medieval castle toy opens at the back and features a movable drawbridge, great hall, stable, smithy, secret treasure chest, the king’s bedroom and 2 tower terraces
6 LEGO minifigures – Includes 6 medieval characters: horse knight king, knight champion, knight archer, knight spearman, blacksmith and serpent knight, plus 2 posable horse figures

Fun medieval gift for kids – This LEGO 3in1 building set offers an immersive build-and-play experience and makes a cool gift for 9+ year old boys and girls, fans of creative toys, horse figures and LEGO bricks
A fun way to build – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive creative adventure as they save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D while they build
LEGO Creator toys to build – 3in1 building sets (sold separately) let kids create 3 different models inspired by some of their biggest passions, including animals, vehicles and houses
description: From the manufacturer 3 medieval toys in 1 box Discover 3 different medieval adventures Boys and girls ages 9 plus can enjoy thrilling medieval adventure with this LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Medieval Horse Knight Castle playset, which rebuilds into a jousting set with a castle or a medieval town with a windmill. Fun build and epic stories Action-packed medieval gift for kids This 3 in 1 set provides an immersive build-and-play experience for kids with a passion for dreaming up medieval stories, who can then proudly display the models on a shelf or desk in their bedrooms. Previous page 6 medieval minifigures LEGO set comes with horse knight king, horse knight champion, horse knight archer, horse knight spearman, blacksmith and serpent knight, plus 2 posable horses. Packed with cool features Medieval castle toy opens at the back and includes a movable drawbridge, great hall, stable, secret treasure chest, king’s bedroom, writing room and 2 tower terraces. Endless play options Kids can role-play stories with 3 different medieval toys (models cannot be built simultaneously): a castle playset, jousting set or a town playset. Next page A fun way to build A digital experience for LEGO builders Let the LEGO Builder app guide your child on an easy and intuitive building adventure. They can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track their progress. Previous page Medieval Dragon (31161) Discover amazing fantasy adventures with this LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Medieval Dragon toy, which can be rebuilt into a sea serpent or a phoenix. Haunted Mansion (31167) Kids can play out scary fun action with this LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Haunted Mansion creepy toy, which can be rebuilt into a haunted ship or train set. Next page
